consistency.notes: The spell adheres to standard D&D 5e spell format. Components (V), casting time, range, and duration are standard. Scaling (At Higher Levels) is consistent with other control spells.

quality.notes: The spell provides a choice between two potent debilitating conditions (Blind/Deaf), making it situationally very useful. The scaling mechanism (one extra target per level above 2nd) is straightforward and balanced for a 2nd-level spell slot.

mechanics.notes: The mechanic relies on a Constitution saving throw to resist the effect, which is appropriate for a physical/sensory impairment. The save is recurring (at the end of each turn) for the target to break the effect, which prevents the spell from being permanent unless the target fails multiple saves, promoting active engagement from the affected player.

potential_issues: None immediately apparent. The spell is balanced by the recurring save required by the target.
